buildCommand: cd content/study-spa&&mkdir -p ../../public/quiz_images&&cp index.html db-client.js explanations.js labs.js quiz_data.js question_images.js ../../public/&&cp -r quiz_images/* ../../public/quiz_images/

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://localhost:11434 https:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
